scenarios.title: Opening Night
scenarios.subtitle: Turn a riverside storefront into a neighborhood favorite.
scenarios.description: Build the first Bella Vista branch, earn the neighborhood's trust, and save enough to take the company beyond Riverside.

intro.headline: A worn storefront. A real chance.
intro.briefing: The old corner restaurant is yours. The sign is faded, the kitchen is small, and Pronto Pizza already owns the lunch rush. Open the doors and give Riverside a reason to remember Bella Vista.

rules.description: Pronto Pizza is the only active rival.

failure_consequence.message: The harbor expansion fund falls through.
The second lease is awarded to Pronto Pizza.
Bella Vista leaves Riverside without a loyal following.

side_missions.text: Complete 20 deliveries for the school fundraiser

failure_consequence.message: The fundraiser orders go to another restaurant.

payload.title: Welcome to Riverside
payload.body: Open carefully, watch the lunch rush, and build a cash reserve.

success.title: Riverside Remembers
success.summary: Bella Vista has a loyal home crowd and a route to the harbor.

failure.title: The First Shop Closes
failure.summary: Bella Vista can no longer cover its Riverside debts.

failure.title: The Harbor Deal Expires
failure.summary: The expansion window closes before Bella Vista is ready.

scenarios.title: Rush at the Docks
scenarios.subtitle: Win the harbor with speed, stock, and consistency.
scenarios.description: Build a delivery network that can survive tourist surges while keeping the harbor branch profitable and well regarded.

intro.headline: The harbor never waits.
intro.briefing: Harbor Quarter never waits. Ferries unload hungry visitors, rents arrive on time, and Swift Eats owns the fastest scooters in town. Bella Vista must become quicker without becoming careless.

rules.description: Harbor leases are charged at the high-rent city rate.
At least one active delivery route must be maintained.

failure_consequence.message: Swift Eats claims the harbor delivery contract.
High harbor rent consumes the expansion budget.
The harbor remembers late orders more than good food.

side_missions.text: Earn 1 award before the harbor gala

failure_consequence.message: The gala chooses a rival caterer.

payload.title: Welcome to Harbor Quarter
payload.body: Routes, stock, and staffing will decide this city.

success.title: Master of the Rush
success.summary: Bella Vista is fast enough for the docks and polished enough for the Heights.

failure.title: Sunk by Rent
failure.summary: The harbor lease drains Bella Vista's final reserve.

failure.title: The Season Moves On
failure.summary: Tourist season ends before Bella Vista secures its place.

scenarios.title: A Seat at the Top
scenarios.subtitle: Build a celebrated company without losing its soul.
scenarios.description: Face entrenched rivals, public scrutiny, and the city awards while establishing Bella Vista as a profitable three-branch institution.

intro.headline: Every table is watching.
intro.briefing: Bella Heights knows every famous chef and every failed opening. Alto Dining has the critics, Bella Due has the money, and the city gala is twenty days away. This is Bella Vista's chance to become an institution.

rules.description: At least one city award is required for victory.
Major price changes can trigger reputation events.

failure_consequence.message: Bella Due captures the remaining premium leases.
Alto Dining takes the gala spotlight.
Bella Vista remains a promising newcomer, not a city institution.
The rooftop celebration is scaled back.

payload.title: A Seat at the Top
payload.body: The gala is coming. Grow carefully and protect the Bella Vista name.

success.title: Bella Vista, At Last
success.summary: Three cities now know the Bella Vista name, and the company has earned its place among the greats.

failure.title: The Heights Prove Too Costly
failure.summary: Premium rents overwhelm the Bella Vista expansion.

failure.title: The Gala Passes
failure.summary: Bella Vista misses its moment to become a city institution.

scenarios.title: Your First Shift
scenarios.subtitle: Learn by running a real Bella Vista service.
scenarios.description: A contextual task chain that observes player actions without taking control. Every step can be skipped, reset, or resumed after loading.

intro.headline: The keys are in your hand.
intro.briefing: The lunch crowd is on its way. Explore Riverside, prepare the restaurant, and open for your first guests.

rules.description: Tutorial steps observe actions and never seize player control.
Every step supports skip and the tutorial supports a full reset.

objectives.text: Pan or zoom the city camera

failure_consequence.message: This step can be retried or skipped.

objectives.text: Buy or lease your first location

failure_consequence.message: This step can be retried or skipped.
This step can be retried or skipped.
This step can be retried or skipped.

objectives.text: Set opening hours and open the restaurant

failure_consequence.message: This step can be retried or skipped.

objectives.text: Open the daily report after a profitable shift

failure_consequence.message: This step can be retried or skipped.

side_missions.text: Finish a day with positive profit

failure_consequence.message: Optional practice can be retried later.

payload.title: Lunch is coming
payload.body: Let the simulation run and watch the operation before opening the report.

success.title: First Shift Complete
success.summary: You know the essentials. Riverside is ready for a real opening night.

scenarios.title: Free Play
scenarios.subtitle: Build Bella Vista your way.
scenarios.description: A reproducible free-play template with selectable city, seed, starting resources, rivals, economy difficulty, victory rule, and optional systems.

intro.headline: Your city, your rules.
intro.briefing: Choose your city and rules, then build without a campaign script. Pick a goal or leave the horizon open.

rules.description: Identical configuration and seed produce the same session setup.
Endless play ignores victory objectives but still records statistics.
City-gated systems follow the selected city's capability flags.

failure_consequence.message: Free play has no campaign consequence.
Free play has no campaign consequence.
Free play has no campaign consequence.

payload.title: Your city, your rules
payload.body: Build toward the selected victory rule or continue endlessly.

success.title: Free Play Goal Complete
success.summary: The selected victory rule is complete. You may keep building.

failure.title: Company Closed
failure.summary: The free-play company can no longer cover its debts.

scenarios.title: Delivery Dash
scenarios.subtitle: One kitchen, one fleet, five frantic days.
scenarios.description: A short delivery-only fixture focused on route throughput, cash discipline, and customer trust.

intro.headline: Every order leaves by scooter.
intro.briefing: The dining room is closed for repairs, but the harbor still wants dinner. Keep one kitchen moving and beat Swift Eats to every doorstep.

rules.description: No additional locations may be acquired.

failure_consequence.message: Swift Eats keeps the harbor contract.
Fast orders still leave disappointed customers.

side_missions.text: Finish with no more than 1 restaurant

failure_consequence.message: No lean-operation bonus is awarded.

payload.title: Dining room closed
payload.body: Every sale must leave by scooter.

success.title: Harbor Express
success.summary: One small kitchen outruns the city's largest fleet.

failure.title: Contract Lost
failure.summary: The delivery quota is not met before repairs finish.

failure.title: Fleet Grounded
failure.summary: The kitchen cannot pay its drivers.

scenarios.title: The Turnaround Table
scenarios.subtitle: Save a tired restaurant before the lease review.
scenarios.description: A short recovery scenario with weak cash, poor reputation, and one underperforming branch.

intro.headline: Seven days to save the corner.
intro.briefing: The Riverside branch has two days of cash left, a tired team, and a lease review in one week. Stabilize the books before Nonna's Kitchen takes the corner.

rules.description: The player may not acquire another location.
Loans are disabled during the lease review.

failure_consequence.message: The landlord rejects the recovery plan.
The lease remains at risk.
Regulars stop returning.
No focused-turnaround bonus is awarded.

payload.title: Lease under review
payload.body: Seven days remain to prove this branch is viable.

payload.title: The landlord arrives tomorrow
payload.body: This is the final full day to finish the recovery.

success.title: Corner Saved
success.summary: The Riverside branch is profitable, trusted, and ready for another season.

failure.title: Doors Closed
failure.summary: The branch runs out of money before the turnaround takes hold.

failure.title: Lease Not Renewed
failure.summary: The landlord awards the corner to Nonna's Kitchen.

scenarios.title: Price War
scenarios.subtitle: Protect the brand when every rival cuts deep.
scenarios.description: A short pricing-pressure fixture that tests cash reserves, daily profit, and reputation under sustained rival discounts.

intro.headline: Do not discount the brand away.
intro.briefing: Pronto and Alto slash prices on the same morning. Matching them could empty the till; ignoring them could empty the dining room. Keep Bella Vista profitable without cheapening its name.

rules.description: Locations cannot be bought or sold during the challenge.

failure_consequence.message: Discounts consume the company's reserve.
The price strategy never becomes sustainable.
Bella Vista wins sales but loses its premium identity.

side_missions.text: Complete 30 deliveries during the price war

failure_consequence.message: Pronto controls the delivery headlines.

success.title: Worth Every Slice
success.summary: Bella Vista protects both its margins and its name.

failure.title: Discounted to Nothing
failure.summary: The company empties its reserve trying to match every rival.

failure.title: Brand Squeezed Out
failure.summary: The campaign ends before Bella Vista proves a sustainable response.
